reviews.comment:
Excelente. Primera vez (calculo que será así wn todo el sur) que me lavo las manos con agua caliente en una estación de servicio. La limpieza bien.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent. First time (I imagine it's the same all over the south) that I've washed my hands with hot water at a gas station. The cleaning was good.

reviews.comment:
Se sabe que no da a basto en temporada, 40 min de fila. No te cargan si deben estirar la manguera, por lo que te toca surtidor del lado de la tapa del tanque. No hay 1 segundo de tiempo en paralelo. Completa un vehículo y luego hacen el otro, no sé si es un tema de estudio de tiempos, sindicato o librado al azar..

(Translated by Google)
It's known that it's overwhelmed during peak season; there's a 40-minute wait. They won't fill you up if they need to extend the hose, so you end up at the pump on the side with the tank cap. There's not a single second of downtime. They fill one vehicle and then do the other; I don't know if it's due to time studies, union procedures, or just random decisions.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtaDV2cXh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Sábado a la noche. Solo.un playero. Fila según el.lado de la tapa del tanque . ... larga cola para cargar combustible en una ciudad llena de turistas

(Translated by Google)
Saturday night. Just one gas station attendant. Line according to the side of the gas cap. ... long line to fill up in a city full of tourists
